query:
SELECT deviceId, COUNT(*) as attempts, SUM(isCorrect) as correct_attempts
FROM puzzle_attempts 
WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY deviceId
ORDER BY attempts DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
